nasb.text: Early in the morning He came again into the temple, and all the people were coming to Him; and He sat down and began to teach them.

esv.text: Early in the morning he came again to the temple. All the people came to him, and he sat down and taught them.

cnv.text: 黎明的時候，他又到聖殿去，眾人都來到他那裡，他就坐下教導他們。

ccb.text: 第二天清晨，祂又回到圣殿。百姓聚集在祂那里，祂就坐下来教导他们。

csbs.text: 清晨，耶稣又来到圣殿，全体民众到他那里，他就坐下，开始教导他们。
